landing.title: Decentralized War Zone Incident Coordinator
landing.description: Deploying Gemini 2.0 Vision auditing engines to capture community hazards, map chronic infraction zones, and automate municipal complaint sweeps in real-time.

report.subtitle: Incident Intake Portal
report.title: Submit Community Diagnostic Report
report.description: Files are evaluated client-side for metadata and processed secure server-side through Gemini 2.0 Vision modules.
report.upload_desc: Drag/drop file or click to trigger camera capture (Enforces physical camera checks)
report.safety_desc: If reporting dangerous encroachments or critical issues under harassment threats, check 'Report Anonymously'. We store a secure hashed token to protect coordinates source.
report.address_placeholder: Enter street lane landmark (Auto-detected if empty)
report.ai_desc: Google Gemini models are inspecting image pixels, checking authenticity scores, and cataloging civic ward entities.
report.exif_warning_desc: Image properties missing. Uploaded file is potentially AI-generated/modified or a screenshot. Added '⚠️ Unverified Media' label.
report.exif_success_desc: Verified original smartphone CCD sensor footprint matching coordinates. Integrity score 0.98.
